document.docTitle: Protea caffra subsp. kilimandscharica Chisumpa & Brummitt
document.masterDocTitle: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

subSubSection.paragraph: Protea caffra Meisn. subsp. kilimandscharica (Engl.) Chisumpa & Brummitt —
Habitat: UMF, HZ, AZ; 2 200–3 800 m. Distribution: IIIa.
Voucher: Sirimon Track, near Old Moses Camp Site, Alt. 3 351 m, 8 Jan. 2014, SAJIT 001643 (HIB).
References: Fries & Fries (1929), Schelpe (1951), Young & Peacock (1985), Brummitt & Marner (1993), Bussmann (1993, 1994, 2006), Beentje (1994).
